title: Muoh Optimize Modpack (Pojav + Pc)
description: This is a minecraft optimize modpack
body:
Muoh  Optimized is the best
optimization modpack to optimize and boost your Minecraft experience with better performance and amazing visuals. Improve FPS, reduce lag, enjoy smooth gameplay with this lightweight and powerful modpack. Perfect for all Minecraft players



⚠️ Warning
 This Modpack is Supported for pojav users and Lunar Client Users
 This Modpack Is Under Alpha 
 
Press the Settings icon and then Video and Renderer  and then Renderer and then  LTE (OPENGL ES3) - 1.17+ only


Based On [Spunky Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spunky-optimized) & [Ez Fps And The Features](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfps)


![Set Renderer into this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad53642c7cd5d5a0faccb7214f03fbf7e167dc0f_0.webp)




![1000 + Fps in Rtx 2050](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d634f6b9eaa4a5b68d7919ac6afcb0f019b05f1d.png)



Mcpack to Zip Converter- https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5591d04424440082910b29d3a5ff599bff58f62.png)
